properties.query:
SecurityAlert
| where ProductName == "Azure Security Center"
| extend Principal_IP_ = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Principal IP"])
| extend Malicious_URL_ = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Malicious URL"])
| where Malicious_URL_ !contains "example.com"
| summarize
    Message=make_set(ProviderName),
    startTime=min(TimeGenerated),
    endTime=max(TimeGenerated),
    EventCount = count()
    by AlertName, Principal_IP_
